ddls:
CREATE TABLE "villages" (
  "village_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each village or parish */,
  "village_name" TEXT /* Name of the village or parish */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the village */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the village */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Brief description of the village's historical significance */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current or historical population of the village */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the village was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village or parish associated with the record */,
  "years_covered" TEXT /* Years covered by the record */,
  "book_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., OFB, OSB) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the record */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to external resource (if applicable) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the record (e.g., CD-ROM, online archive) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time the record was added to the database */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "digitized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the record is digitized */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the digitized file (if available) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the record (if applicable) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the record was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, contributor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
